Fighting With My Family (2019)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $22,958,583Details
International Box Office $18,544,505
Worldwide Box Office $41,503,088
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $874,445
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $1,620,642
Total $2,495,087
Further financial details...

Synopsis

Gangster Ricky, wife Julia, daughter Paige and son Zak make a living wrestling together in tiny venues. When Paige and Zak get the opportunity to try out for WWE, the family grabs a once-in-a-lifetime chance to turn their wildest dreams into a dazzling future. However, brother and sister quickly discover that to become superstars, both their talent and their relationship will be put to the test.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$138,780 (0.6% of total gross)
Legs:2.94 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:55.3% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$11,000,000 (worldwide box office is 3.8 times production budget)
Theater counts:4 opening theaters/2,855 max. theaters, 4.0 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $29,976,496

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: February 14th, 2019 (Limited) by MGM
February 22nd, 2019 (Expands Wide) by United Artists
International Releases: February 27th, 2019 (Wide) (United Kingdom)
March 1st, 2019 (Wide), released as Семейни кютеци (Bulgaria)
March 15th, 2019 (Wide) (Australia)
March 21st, 2019 (Wide) (New Zealand)
March 22nd, 2019 (Wide) (Ecuador)
Video Release: April 30th, 2019 by Universal Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG-13 for crude and sexual material, language throughout, some violence and drug content.
(Rating bulletin 2505 (Cert #51317), 12/6/2017)
Running Time: 107 minutes
Cast, crew, or production detail: Directing Yourself, Epilogue, Fictionalized Version of Yourself, Intertitle, Scene in End Credits, Screenplay Written By the Star
Film festival: Sundance Film Festival 2019
Plot point: Biography, Dysfunctional Family, Inspirational Sports, Sibling Rivalry, Wrestling
Subgenre: Sports Comedy
Source:Based on Real Life Events
Genre:Comedy
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Dramatization
Production/Financing Companies: Film4, Misher Films, Seven Bucks Productions, WWE Studios, Metro-Goldwyn-Mayer Pictures, Ink Factory
Production Countries: United Kingdom, United States
Languages: English

  • Summary

  • Full Financials

Synopsis

Gangster Ricky, wife Julia, daughter Paige and son Zak make a living wrestling together in tiny venues. When Paige and Zak get the opportunity to try out for WWE, the family grabs a once-in-a-lifetime chance to turn their wildest dreams into a dazzling future. However, brother and sister quickly discover that to become superstars, both their talent and their relationship will be put to the test.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$138,780 (0.6% of total gross)

Domestic Share:55.3% (domestic box office/worldwide)

Theater counts:4 opening theaters/2,855 max. theaters, 4.0 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $29,976,496
